title: We Still Kill the Old Way
writer: Elio Petri, Ugo Pirro, Leonardo Sciascia
actors: Gian Maria Volontè, Irene Papas, Gabriele Ferzetti
plot: In Sicily, a leftist professor investigates the "honor killings" of two friends, uncovering a tangled web involving politicians, the Mafia, the Church, and the widow of one of the victims.
